triage_rows.detail: Program-level reading must now treat reduce as frozen and no longer as an open semantic branch.
Program-level reading should mark intraday add as the next frontier, but still deferred until an explicit shift is authorized.
Do not silently start intraday add simply because reduce is frozen; wait for the later deliberate opening.

interpretation: V1.34CU refreshes the program-level frontier reading after reduce handoff completion.
The result is intentionally conservative: the next frontier is named, but not opened by implication.
